metaDescription: Rent Pioneer CDJ-3000s, speakers, subwoofers, lighting, DJ booths & CO2 effects in NYC. Trusted by club promoters, DJs & event planners across Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, NJ & CT. Free delivery on orders $350+.

hero.title: Experience Absolute Audio Power
hero.desc: NYC's premium backline, DJ equipment, concert sound systems, and professional lighting rentals for club promoters, private parties, weddings, and corporate events.

specs.label: Service Area
specs.value: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, NJ & CT

about.title: The Standard in Live Production
about.subtitle: Uncompromising Quality. Crystal Clear Rigging.
about.bodyFirst: Soundscape NYC is the go-to DJ equipment and backline rental company for event promoters, DJs, and concert planners across the New York metropolitan area. We stock Pioneer CDJ-3000s, DJM-A9 mixers, RCF and FBT powered speakers, HDL line arrays, professional lighting rigs, DJ booths, staging, CO2 jets, and trussing — all available for daily rental with free delivery on orders over $350. Whether you're rigging a Brooklyn nightclub, a Manhattan rooftop event, a Long Island wedding, a Queens private party, or a corporate function in New Jersey or Connecticut, we deliver tested, stage-ready gear to your venue.
about.bodySecond: Every piece of equipment is stress-tested before dispatch so you never deal with dead channels or faulty gear on event night. We offer flexible daily rental rates with clear pricing — no hidden fees. Orders over $350 include complimentary drop-off and pickup across our full service area. A security deposit is required on all rentals. Note that on-site installation and connection are not included in standard rates but can be arranged for line array and complex rig setups.

features.title: Concert Backline & DJ Decks
features.desc: Pioneer CDJ-3000s, DJM-A9 mixers, V10 controllers, and active stand-alone decks for club sets and live shows.

features.title: Speakers, Subs & Line Arrays
features.desc: Powered RCF and FBT speakers, 18" subwoofers, and HDL 30 line arrays — from intimate venues to full-scale productions.

features.title: Lighting, Staging & Effects
features.desc: Moving heads, LED wash lights, laser projectors, DJ booths, trussing, CO2 jets, and event staging equipment.

features.title: NYC-Wide Delivery
features.desc: Free drop-off and pickup on orders $350+ across Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, NJ & Connecticut.

delivery.notice: A security deposit is required on all rentals.

footer.description: Soundscape NYC is the premier DJ equipment rental, concert backline, and sound system rental company serving New York City. From Pioneer CDJ decks and RCF speakers to lighting rigs, DJ booths, and CO2 effects — we supply club promoters, wedding planners, and event professionals across Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Long Island, NJ & CT.

policies.item: * Installation & connection not included unless stated in quote
* Line Array pricing requires phone check
* Sound technician included with Line Arrays
* Standard equipment is drop-off/pick up only
* Security deposit required on all rentals
